turns.user_message: My stomach gets tight when I think about that mistake. It used to just be a bad day feeling.
That knot in my gut comes back every time I remember it. I can't shake the feeling that it's my fault.
The ache is constant now, like my body is punishing me. I deserve this weight for what I did.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling. This used to not bother the speaker.
